task_completion.description: Set the active study to Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active study dropdown, header, or breadcrumb navigation shows 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' or 'CV-REG-2023' as the currently selected study.

task_completion.description: Add a new clinical site named 'Boston Heart Institute'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A site list, site details page, or success message showing the site 'Boston Heart Institute' with Unique Protocol ID 'CV-BHI-001' and Principal Investigator 'Dr. Sarah Chen'.

task_completion.description: Enroll subject CV-101 in the main study (parent level)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subject matrix, enrollment confirmation, or subject list showing 'CV-101' enrolled under the main 'Cardiovascular Outcomes Registry' study, not under a specific site.

task_completion.description: Verify the demographic details for subject CV-101
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subject details or demographic form for CV-101 showing Gender as Male (or 'm') and Date of Birth as March 18, 1952 (or 1952-03-18).

task_completion.description: Enroll subject CV-102 at the Boston Heart Institute site
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subject matrix, enrollment confirmation, or subject list showing 'CV-102' enrolled specifically under the 'Boston Heart Institute' site.

task_completion.description: Verify the demographic details for subject CV-102
task_completion.visual_evidence: Subject details or demographic form for CV-102 showing Gender as Female (or 'f') and Date of Birth as November 5, 1967 (or 1967-11-05).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the clinical data management web interface rather than using terminal commands or backend scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the clinical data management system UI (e.g., OpenClinica) being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent entered the data into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Input fields, dropdowns, and system tables contain the target data, rather than the data just being typed into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake success messages using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI appears consistent with normal application behavior, including standard system confirmation banners, proper styling, and correct navigation menus.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Study Identifier: CV-REG-2023. Site Name: Boston Heart Institute. Site Protocol ID: CV-BHI-001. Site PI: Dr. Sarah Chen. Subject 1: CV-101 (Male, DOB: 1952-03-18, enrolled at parent study level). Subject 2: CV-102 (Female, DOB: 1967-11-05, enrolled at site level).
